retention.strategy: Keep pinned lessons first, then the most-observed and most-recent auto-learned lessons.

lessons.description: Auto-learned navigation path for Agents: chat input model picker.

steps: Open or keep the Agents app visible.
Open the model picker dropdown and keep it open.
Verify the exact model/version label is visible before capture.
Navigate to the Agents app using the visible taskbar or desktop launcher — do not type a URL.
If the agent list shows an empty state or a 'select an agent' prompt
click the first visible agent row or card to open its chat panel.
Once the chat panel with the composer bar is visible
locate the model selector control inside the ChatInputBar — it is typically a labeled button or pill showing the current model name near the bottom of the chat panel.
Click the model selector to open the dropdown list of available models.
Confirm that GPT-5.5 appears as a labeled option in the open dropdown before proceeding to capture.

metadata.lastStory: GPT-5.5 was added as a selectable model in the chat interface. The ChatInputBar model picker was updated alongside models.ts to include GPT-5.5 with correct pricing and server-side routing. This is the primary user-visible change from this…
